Price Intensity: Using high-moment price dynamics (skewness, kurtosis) to predict reversals.
Liquidity-Adjusted Momentum: Weighting traditional momentum by relative volume or adv20 gaps.
Intraday-to-Close Divergence: Capturing institutional accumulation via vwap vs close spreads.
Macro-Regime Sensitivity: Adapting signals based on volatility regimes (ts_std_dev filters).
Low-Turnover Factor Timing: Using multi-layered smoothing (ts_decay_linear + ts_mean) to stabilize signals.
Capital-Efficient Reversals: Applying long-window ranking (ts_rank > 20) to high-moment price intensity.
Robust Institutional Spreads: vwap vs close divergence smoothed with ts_decay_linear.
Fitness-Optimized Momentum: Identifying persistent trends using ts_zscore on long-term returns.
Cross-Sectional Dispersion: Utilizing the gap between group_mean and individual price action.
Volume-Weighted Reversion: Fading violent price spikes that lack volume confirmation.
Decaying Return Shocks: Using jump_decay on ts_delta(close) to isolate structural shifts.
Entropy-Based Regimes: Employing ts_entropy to dynamically size positions based on market noise.
Vector Orthogonalization: Generating orthogonal signals using vector_neut to achieve purely idiosyncratic alpha.
